title: Commercial Graduate Rotation Program - South African Market
description: **Description** **Start Date: August 2026** The EMEA Graduate Rotation Program is a new and exciting 12 month program which welcomes ambitious graduates who would like to begin their career journey within sales and solution engineering. It is a rotational program designed to give graduates exposure to both sales development and solution engineering. Having built the foundational skills and passed all required eligibility and readiness criteria, our graduates can then go on to pursue one of these two clear career paths. Our Top Graduates can potentially promote to the career path of their choice, (depending on business demand) by month 7 of the program. Our graduate program is a fully immersive program combining comprehensive learning paths, in\-role experience, customer interaction and mentorship from senior sales and solution engineering professionals. At Salesforce, you will have the opportunity to lay the foundations for a successful career in sales \& solution engineering and accelerate your career at a fast pace. We are a proud member of *Fortune 100* *Best Places to Work* list for the past 12 years and a consistent winner of *Great Places to Work.* **Who are we looking for?** * You are a 2025 or 2026 graduate (minimum bachelor’s degree). We consider applicants from All Academic Fields * You are interested in the impact technology can have on the world and business * You are a creative problem\-solver * You are a relationship builder and possess a growth mindset * Are curious, self\-motivated and focused on continuous learning * You thrive working in a team environment * You have excellent interpersonal skills * You are goal\-orientated and comfortable with a fast\-paced environment * You are fluent in English **What Does Our New EMEA Graduate Program Look Like** The Program is structured as follows: **Introduction Month** During your first month you will have extensive onboarding enablement in a Salesforce\-like academy, where you will: * Get immersed in the culture of salesforce and truly understand our values * Develop an understanding of our solutions, technologies and tools. * Learn critical professional skills for your career in salesforce * Structured learning calendar with sessions \& hands\-on workshops led by experts and program alumni **Rotations** During this Graduate Program you will have the opportunity to experience **the Sales Graduate Path** and **the Solution Engineering Graduate Path.** The structure for both are similar, for both you will spend 60% of your time immersed in the role, you will have clear tasks, clear targets and you will align with key stakeholders and the other 40% of your time will be spent on role specific learning. You will be paired with mentors/buddies with experience in the path. If during your first rotation (months 2 throughout to month 4\) are on the Solution Engineering Graduate Rotation, then you will join the Sales Graduate Rotation (from month 5 through to 7\) and vice versa. So in the these 6 months you will have exposure to both roles. Your time spent mastering the fundamentals of both these roles during these rotations will empower you to be even more productive and impactful when you eventually promote. Throughout the rotations there will be self paced certification and skills assessment. You will be required to meet all readiness eligibility criteria before you can Panel for Promotion. **An Example of what you can expect during the specific rotations** **The Sales Graduate Rotation** * You will be taught salesforce’s best in class prospecting and qualification methodologies * You will learn how to use social, digital, video, chat and phone platforms to effectively engage with Salesforce prospects * You will collaborative with Sales Development Specialists to run campaigns and help build sales pipeline for the EMEA Sales organisation **The Solution Engineer Graduate Rotation** * You will have the opportunity to learn our solutions at a deeper more technical level * You work closely with the solution engineering organisation supporting them in building cutting edge cutomer demonstrations * You will learn the art of customer discovery \& how to create a customer point of view **What’s in it for you?** * A clear and structured career path within our Sales and Solution Engineering organisation * Opportunity to work in an international team, within a nurturing environment * Opportunity to join our diverse internal employee groups * Comprehensive benefits package * Relocation budget and guidance in your relocation\-process * Additional seven days paid time off for charitable causes \- check out our 1\-1\-1 model **Map Your Future** With our Graduate Program you will have the choice of career paths * You can choose to take a Sales Path where after your Grad Program Rotations you can progress to Sales Development Representative, Business Development Representative and then into our Sales organisation as Account Executive, where you will position our solutions to potential customers. In some instances, this path may vary or be subject to change. * You can choose to take a Solution Engineering path where after your Grad Program Rotations you can progress to Associate Solution Engineer and rise to work at every customer level ESB, SMB, GRB. In some instances, this path may vary or be subject to change. * With our strong culture of mentoring we strive to develop industry\-leading sales and solution engineering leaders. This is a phenomenal opportunity to develop your international experience in an organisation that has transformed the Enterprise Software Market with Cloud Computing **Salesforce in Dublin** When we opened our first office in Ireland in 2000 we were one of the first digital companies to locate here. Today, our Dublin office has grown into a leading technology hub, and Salesforce is the global leader in customer relationship management (CRM), bringing companies of every size and industry together with their customers. Our new Salesforce Tower Dublin will bring our dynamic, multinational team together in the vibrant Silicon Docks area. **Accommodations** If you require assistance due to a disability applying for open positions please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form. **Posting Statement** At Salesforce we believe that the business of business is to improve the state of our world. Each of us has a responsibility to drive Equality in our communities and workplaces. We are committed to creating a workforce that reflects society through inclusive programs and initiatives such as equal pay, employee resource groups, inclusive benefits, and more. Learn more about Equality at Salesforce and explore our benefits. Salesforce.com and Salesforce.org are Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action Employers. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender perception or identity, national origin, age, marital status, protected veteran status, or disability status. Salesforce.com and Salesforce.org do not accept unsolicited headhunter and agency resumes. Salesforce.com and Salesforce.org will not pay any third\-party agency or company that does not have a signed agreement with Salesforce.com or Salesforce.org. Salesforce welcomes all.

title: Computer Science Student
description: We are looking for a **Computer Science student** for a summer position to support the introduction of AI tools and automation into our workflows and assist with the preparation of certification submissions in conjunction with a senior colleague. This is a great opportunity for an undergraduate or postgraduate student interested in practical AI applications, process improvement, and business operations. **Role Overview:** * Part\-time summer role, 3 days per week, office\-based * Assist in identifying areas where AI can improve internal workflows * Research and test AI tools that can support daily operations and integrate with current software * Help implement simple automations and process improvements * Work with the team to streamline administrative and operational tasks * Asist to prepare ISO submissions and the renewal of annual cyber security accreditations **Ideal Candidate:** * Currently studying **Computer Science**, Software Engineering, or a related field * Strong interest in **artificial intelligence**, automation, and practical tech solutions * Good problem\-solving skills and ability to suggest practical improvements * Strong communication skills and ability to explain technical ideas clearly * Experience with AI tools, scripting, or workflow automation is an advantage **What We’re Looking For:** Someone proactive who can explore how AI can be integrated into everyday business processes, help trial solutions, and support us in making our workflows more efficient. Please send your CV and a short summary of your interest/experience with AI or automation.

title: Consulting Associate - 2026
description: **Introduction** A career in IBM Consulting is built on long\-term client relationships and close collaboration worldwide. You’ll work with leading companies across industries, helping them shape their hybrid cloud and AI journeys. With support from our strategic partners, robust IBM technology, and Red Hat, you’ll have the tools to drive meaningful change and accelerate client impact. At IBM Consulting, curiosity fuels success. You’ll be encouraged to challenge the norm, explore new ideas, and create innovative solutions that deliver real results. Our culture of growth and empathy focuses on your long\-term career development while valuing your unique skills and experiences. **Your Role And Responsibilities** As a Graduate Consultant at IBM, you will embark on an exciting career journey as you build strong technical, sales, solutioning and project delivery skills, within a consulting business. You will become familiar with IBM’s organisation and ow we work with clients to address their most complex business and technology challenges. Collaboration with leading experts from across IBM and our partner ecosystem provides hands‑on exposure to real project challenges and best‑practice sales, solution design and delivery. In this environment you will develop a clear understanding of how technologies including AI, automation, security, cloud, business application and data analytics solutions are delivered, and how they create measurable business value. Working in our Global Services Integration Hub (SIH) in Dublin, you will deepen your understanding of how modern technologies are architected, delivered and scaled across our global organisation. You will gain experience across industries, applications, enterprise platforms and solution domains, preparing you for future roles in business/technical solution design and delivery, project management and leadership, and establishing a strong foundation for long‑term career growth. The role provides a clear pathway for career progression. Typical progression routes include Business Analyst, Generative AI Specialist, Project Manager, IT Architect, Technology Specialist and Security Specialist, Sales and Strategy. **Required Technical And Professional Expertise** IBM Graduate Consultant, you will gain experience across areas such as Artificial Intelligence, Advanced Analytics, Cognitive Solutions, Enterprise Applications, Cloud Services and Security. **We Require You To** * As an equal opportunities employer, we welcome applications from individuals of all backgrounds. Please note that we are unable to provide visa sponsorship now or in the future. This role requires regular travel to clients across Ireland, the UK, and Europe, so candidates must have the legal right to work and travel within these regions without restriction. * This role requires flexibility in working patterns, including up to five days per week on\-site, at our Dublin office on the Technology Campus, Damastown and being available from time to time for Global Teams meetings. * Be on track for, or have achieved, a 2:1 grade in a Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics focused discipline. Graduates from other fields are welcome with a demonstrated interest in technology and AI * Think logically and analytically, approach problems with structure and curiosity. * Communicate clearly and confidently with technical and non\-technical stakeholders. * Be motivated to understand how modern technology—including AI—solves real business challenges. * Work effectively and proactively in teams, demonstrate a positive attitude, and thrive in collaborative environments. * Have some experience in programming, data tools or an understanding of basic IT concepts. * Demonstrate awareness of cybersecurity principles and good technology practices. * Available to commence full\-time employment with expected start dates in September, October or November.

title: Content Creator & Digital Marketing Executive (Junior)
description: **Role Summary** We’re looking for a creative, enthusiastic, and motivated Junior Content Creator \& Digital Marketing Executive to join our team. This is an excellent opportunity for someone early in their marketing career who is passionate about social media, content creation, and digital marketing. You’ll support the planning and creation of engaging content across social platforms while gaining hands\-on experience in a fast\-paced environment. The role is ideal for someone eager to develop their skills in video production, social media management, and digital campaigns. **Key Responsibilities** **Content Creation \& Social Media** * Develop and execute creative concepts for digital campaigns across social and web channels * Produce engaging, social\-first content including short\-form video, behind\-the\-scenes, and product\-focused assets * Capture and edit video content optimised for each platform * Collaborate with internal teams to identify authentic content opportunities * Plan, schedule, and manage content across social media platforms * Write compelling, on\-brand copy for posts, campaigns, and blogs to support engagement and SEO **Website, CRM \& Digital Channel Support** * Maintain and update website content * Monitor website performance and user behaviour using analytics tools * Create and schedule email and SMS campaigns aligned with customer journeys * Ensure consistency across all digital touchpoints **Collaboration \& Campaign Execution** * Work closely with internal stakeholders to deliver integrated marketing campaigns * Support the planning and execution of photoshoots and video content production * Manage multiple campaigns simultaneously in a fast\-paced environment **Requirements \& Skills** * 2\+ years’ experience in a digital marketing or content\-focused role * Proven ability to create engaging digital content across social platforms * Experience with video editing tools * Links to previous content work and editing capabilities * Experience managing social media accounts, including content planning and scheduling * Understanding of paid advertising platforms (Google Ads, PPC) * Strong understanding of analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics) and performance tracking * Full driving licence (role includes travel) * Excellent organisational skills with the ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines * Strong communication and collaboration skills **Nice\-to\-Have Skills** * Experience in SEO strategy and execution * Background in eCommerce, retail, or B2B environments * Copywriting, photography, or basic design skills * Experience with email marketing platforms and automation * Passion for digital trends, content creation, and emerging technologies **What Success Looks Like in This Role** * Consistently producing high\-quality, engaging content that drives audience growth and engagement * Delivering measurable improvements in campaign performance (ROI, CTR, conversions) * Maintaining a strong, consistent brand presence across all digital channels * Successfully managing multiple campaigns while meeting deadlines and KPIs Bringing fresh, creative ideas that elevate the brand and resonate with target audiences

title: Content Creator – Interior Design, Dublin
description: This freelance opportunity is ideal for a creative professional with a passion for social media and storytelling. The project centers on producing engaging Instagram content that highlights the founders of a Dublin\-based interior design business. The selected candidate will work on\-site to capture the unique personalities and style of the founders, translating their vision into compelling visual and written content for a targeted online audience. This is a one\-off project requiring a hands\-on approach and a keen eye for detail, with the goal of elevating the brand’s presence on social media. **Deliverables** * Develop and execute a content plan focused on the business founders for Instagram * Capture high\-quality photos and short\-form videos on\-site in Dublin * Edit and optimize content for Instagram, ensuring alignment with brand aesthetics * Collaborate with the founders to ensure authentic representation of their personalities and design ethos * Deliver a suite of ready\-to\-post content, including captions and hashtags tailored for audience engagement **Requirements** * Proven experience in social media content creation, preferably for lifestyle or design brands * Strong photography and videography skills, with a portfolio demonstrating relevant work * Proficiency in editing tools such as Adobe Creative Suite or mobile editing apps * Ability to work on\-site in Dublin for the duration of the project * Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to collaborate effectively with the founders * Understanding of Instagram trends, best practices, and audience engagement strategies * Creative mindset with attention to detail and a strong sense of visual storytelling **About Twine** Twine is a leading freelance marketplace connecting top freelancers, consultants, and contractors with companies needing creative and tech expertise. Trusted by Fortune 500 companies and innovative startups alike, Twine enables companies to scale their teams globally. **Our Mission** Twine's mission is to empower creators and businesses to thrive in an AI\-driven, freelance\-first world.

title: Corporate Associate
description: A leading law firm is seeking a talented and ambitious Associate Lawyer to join its Corporate M\&A team. The successful candidate will work on high\-profile, complex transactions for a diverse client base, including multinational corporations, financial institutions, private equity firms, and emerging industry leaders. This is an exciting opportunity to be part of a dynamic and collaborative team at the forefront of corporate legal practice. **Key Responsibilities** * Advising clients on a wide range of corporate matters, including mergers and acquisitions, private equity transactions, joint ventures, corporate reorganisations, and governance issues. * Drafting and negotiating complex legal documents with precision and clarity. * Collaborating with cross\-border and interdisciplinary teams to deliver seamless advice on multi\-jurisdictional transactions. * Providing commercially focused legal solutions tailored to meet client needs. * Building and maintaining strong relationships with clients by delivering exceptional service and trusted advice. * Contributing to business development initiatives, including networking events, thought leadership activities, and identifying opportunities for new work streams. * Staying informed about market trends, regulatory developments, and best practices in corporate law. **Skills, Knowledge \& Expertise** The ideal candidate will have: **\*\*\* Admitted to practice law in Ireland, England or Wales.** * 2\-4 years of relevant post\-qualification experience (PQE) in Corporate/M\&A from a top\-tier or highly regarded law firm. * Strong academic credentials with a proven track record of excellence. * Exceptional technical skills in drafting and negotiating legal documents. * A high level of commercial awareness and the ability to provide pragmatic solutions to complex challenges. * Excellent critical thinking skills with a calm and measured approach to problem\-solving under pressure. * The ability to manage competing priorities effectively while maintaining attention to detail. * Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build lasting relationships with colleagues and clients alike. * A proactive mindset that embraces feedback and continuous professional development. **Benefits** The role offers: * Competitive remuneration package with performance\-based bonuses. * Generous annual leave entitlement. * Flexible working arrangements, including hybrid working policies where applicable. * Access to wellness programmes, including mental health support and fitness initiatives. * Tax\-efficient benefits such as commuter savings plans or bike\-to\-work schemes. * Coverage of professional membership fees to support career development. **About You** You are a driven and commercially minded lawyer who thrives in a fast\-paced environment. You are passionate about delivering exceptional client service while developing your expertise in Corporate/M\&A law within a supportive and collaborative team. If you are ready to take the next step in your career by joining a leading Corporate M\&A practice, apply below! **Robert Walters Operations Limited is an employment business and employment agency and welcomes applications from all candidates**

title: Customer Assistant (Permanent 20/25 Hours) - Dundrum
description: **About the role** We pride ourselves on offering customers the biggest range of products around. And that's not just food, but everything from clothes and kettles to financial services. But did you know we offer the biggest job opportunities too? With stores across the UK and Ireland, and a variety of roles, we are always looking for people who are as passionate about helping customers as we are. Our Every Little Helps approach doesn't just apply to our customers. It's at the very heart of everything we do at work – and it's what makes us different. We believe in treating each other with respect, and everyone having the opportunity to get on. That's what makes Tesco such a great place to work **Should you be successful in your application, your offer will be subject to and conditional upon you providing your bank account details before your agreed start date.** **You will be responsible for** * Always put the customer first and consider them in everything you do. * Get to know your customers and serve them with pride. * Help to ensure products and services are available for customers at all times. * Handle all products with care to maintain quality and ensure they reach the customer in the best condition. * Keep the shop floor and back areas clean and tidy at all times. * Using the training you receive, follow department routines and processes. * Follow all company policies and adhere to Health and Safety routines. * Whilst you will have a core role, you may be asked to support your colleagues by helping in other departments. **You will need** * Able to give great, natural customer service by proactively smiling, greeting, acknowledging and helping customers. * Works hard for customers, your team and your department. * You are able to prioritise to ensure anything you do is right for our customers. * Adaptable and resilient to meet the ever changing demands of our business. * You must be able to follow instructions either verbal or written. * You are reliable and a good timekeeper. * You must be smart and tidy at all times. **Whats in it for you?** We offer excellent benefits that help make Tesco a great place to work. These include but aren’t limited to: * Competitive Salary * Bonus Scheme\* * Our Virtual GP service provides free and confidential access to an online GP through video GP consultations, and online prescription service for colleagues. The service is also available to families of colleagues who live at the same address for a reduced cost. * 24/7 access to our Employee Assistance Programme (EAP) for you and family members for in the moment emotional support along with free access to a range of wellbeing services supporting you under our new Wellbeing First approach of Body, Mind and Life. * Colleague Clubcard offering 10% discount across stores and online, with 15% discount weekends once a month (Friday to Sunday), and 20% off twice a year. There is also 20% off F\&F clothing, all year long, these various discounts can be extended to a family member with a 2 nd Clubcard available.\* * Life Assurance * Pension Scheme\* * Save As You Earn Scheme\* * Paid Family Leave * Bike to Work * Long Service Awards * Commuter Scheme \*Entry requirements and rules of the scheme apply **About Us** Our vision at Tesco is to become every customer’s favourite way to shop, whether they are at home or out on the move. Our core purpose is “Serving our customers, communities and planet a little better every day”. Serving means more than a transactional relationship with our customers. It means acting as a responsible and sustainable business for all stakeholders, for the communities we are part of, and for the planet. Through initiatives like the Tesco Community Fund, our association with Children’s Health Foundation, our partnership with FoodCloud and our Stronger Starts programme, we have supported over 21,000 community groups, raised over €7\.5 million for medical equipment, and provided almost 15 million meals nationwide, to those living in food insecurity. Tesco has operated in the Irish retail market since 1997, and with 170 stores nationwide, we employ over 13,000 people in cities and towns around Ireland, supporting almost 45,000 jobs directly and indirectly. We partner with over 500 Irish suppliers \- of which almost three\-quarters are small and medium enterprises \- which in turn supports almost 13,000 farming families around Ireland. Tesco is the single largest buyer of Irish food and drink in the world, buying €1\.6 Billion a year; more than any other single country in the European Union, more than even the USA which you perceive as a massive buyer of Irish food. We work closely with suppliers across Ireland who are dedicated to making the best products for our customers and this is reflected in the numerous awards our products have won over the years including Blás Na hÉireann, World Steak Challenge and Great Taste Awards. We are proud to have an inclusive culture at Tesco where everyone truly feels able to be themselves. It is embedded in our values: we treat people how they want to be treated. At Tesco, we not only celebrate diversity, but recognise the value and opportunity it brings. We always want our colleagues to feel they can be themselves at work and we are committed to helping them be at their best. We know life looks a little different for each of us. That’s why at Tesco, we always welcome chats about flexible working. Some people are at the start of their careers, some want the freedom to do the things they love. Others are going through life\-changing moments like becoming a carer, nearing retirement, adapting to parenthood, or something else. So, talk to us throughout your application about how we can support. Tesco is committed to celebrating diversity and everyone is welcome at Tesco. We're committed to providing a fully inclusive recruitment process, allowing candidates the opportunity to thrive and inform us of any reasonable adjustments they may require. For further information on the accessibility support we can offer, please click http://roi.tesco\-careers.com/accessibility/ **How can I let Tesco know I need additional support?** Please let us know you need additional support by emailing **tescoireland.recruitment@tesco.ie** This will allow us to understand more about you and how we can best support you through the recruitment process.

title: Customer Experience Specialist - Korean & English Speaker (Bangkok)
description: **About Agoda** At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world. Today, we are part of Booking Holdings \[NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide. No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us. **Our Purpose – Bridging the World Through Travel** We believe travel allows people to enjoy, learn and experience more of the amazing world we live in. It brings individuals and cultures closer together, fostering empathy, understanding and happiness. We are a skillful, driven and diverse team from across the globe, united by a passion to make an impact. Harnessing our innovative technologies and strong partnerships, we aim to make travel easy and rewarding for everyone. At Agoda, we believe our people are our strength. We work hard and have fun, and we choose people who are dedicated to making things great. **Get to Know Our Team** Agoda’s Customer Support Team understands that travel can be an everchanging environment. That is why we provide in\-person, real\-time help around the clock and in 16 languages. No matter the issue, we present the best of Agoda’s values to each and every customer with multiple support channels and a strong desire to serve. Certainly, doing more than answering phone calls or replying to emails, our specialists actively look for ways to improve our customer’s experience. We quickly adapt to challenges by collaborating with other teams and experimenting on everything we can. This has allowed us to develop new and effective products that produce meaningful results and continue to drive Agoda’s business performance. Our Customer Support Team serves a daily role in contributing to a core strength and service of Agoda with a clear vision and a focus on efficient and satisfying customer support. **The Opportunity** As a Customer Experience Specialist in **Bangkok, Thailand** , supporting **Korean and English** , you will: * Build strong problem\-solving and communication skills that open doors to many future roles * Support customers and partners from multiple countries and cultures, gaining truly global experience * Join a data\-driven, fast\-learning team that experiments, improves, and shares feedback openly **In this Role, you'll get to:** * Deliver outstanding service to guests and partners via phone, email, and chat * Handle a high volume of inquiries and deliver accurate, timely resolutions * Take end\-to\-end ownership of booking issues (e.g. changes, cancellations, payments, and other customer queries) * Work towards achieving individual and team KPIs (e.g. quality, productivity, customer satisfaction, etc.) * Apply Agoda policies and procedures in a fair and consistent way * Collaborate with Team Leaders, Managers, and other teams to resolve complex or unusual cases * Safeguard customer data and maintain strict confidentiality at all times * Work rotational shifts (including mornings, evenings, and nights) to support a 24/7 global operation * As part of a rotating shift schedule, you’ll occasionally work weekends and public holidays, planned in advance with your team * Enjoy Agoda's Hybrid work model, i.e. primarily work\-from\-home, with on\-site collaboration days roughly 1 week out of every 8 weeks **Core Skills And Competencies** * A bachelor's degree is required * Strong customer focus and a genuine desire to help others * Excellent spoken and written Korean skills, and Business level of English * Ability to stay calm, accurate, and professional under pressure * Good problem\-solving skills, using guidelines and data to make decisions effectively * Flexibility to adapt to new tools, processes, and feedback * Ability to manage time and priorities in a fast\-paced, high\-volume environment * Reliability, integrity, and a positive, collaborative attitude **Nice to Have** * Prior working experience in customer support, contact center, or service roles * Experience in travel, e\-commerce, hospitality, or BPO is a plus * Experience working with international customers or partners * Familiarity with contact center, CRM, or ticketing systems * Additional language skills beyond the core required language for the role if any **Why Agoda** * Hybrid work \- Starting 4th months, working from home for 7weeks \+ working from office for 1 week (8weeks cycle) * Competitive compensation with performance\-based incentives * Annual discretionary performance bonus * Health insurance and other locally competitive benefits * Agoda travel discounts and special rates on accommodation and related products * Work from anywhere for up to 30 days per year * Structured training, coaching, and clear performance metrics * Opportunities to grow your career within the Customer Experience Group or across Agoda * An inclusive, international work environment where your ideas and feedback are valued * Agoda choice(welfare points) * $400 USD allowance to set up your home office(one time payment) * Daily snack \+ coffee machine **Hiring Process:** * Application Review \- 1st Interview with HR \- Job aptitude test \- 2nd interview with Hiring Manager \- Final decision \& Offer \#2 \#3 \#CUST \#seoul \#bangkok \#sydney \#melbourne \#perth \#toronto \#vancouver \#shanghai \#beijing \#shenzhen \#prague \#hongkong \#dublin \#tokyo \#osaka \#yokohama \#kualalumpur \#warsaw \#krakow \#singapore \#barcelona \#madrid \#taipei \#dubai \#hcmc \#hanoi \#edinburgh \#phuket \#nagoya \#okinawa \#fukuoka \#sapporo \#manila \#OTHR Please review our Hiring Process Guidelines before your interview — click here to learn how interviewing at Agoda works. **Discover More About Working At Agoda** * Agoda Careers https://careersatagoda.com * Facebook https://www.facebook.com/agodacareers/ * LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/agoda * YouTube https://www.youtube.com/agodalife **Equal Opportunity Employer** At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics. We will keep your application on file so that we can consider you for future vacancies and you can always ask to have your details removed from the file. For more details please read our privacy policy. **Disclaimer** We do not accept any terms or conditions, nor do we recognize any agency’s representation of a candidate, from unsolicited third\-party or agency submissions. If we receive unsolicited or speculative CVs, we reserve the right to contact and hire the candidate directly without any obligation to pay a recruitment fee.

title: Customer Support Technician
description: **Who We Are** Applied Materials is a global leader in materials engineering solutions used to produce virtually every new chip and advanced display in the world. We design, build and service cutting\-edge equipment that helps our customers manufacture display and semiconductor chips – the brains of devices we use every day. As the foundation of the global electronics industry, Applied enables the exciting technologies that literally connect our world – like AI and IoT. If you want to push the boundaries of materials science and engineering to create next generation technology, join us to deliver material innovation that changes the world. **What We Offer** Location: Leixlip,IRL You’ll benefit from a supportive work culture that encourages you to learn, develop, and grow your career as you take on challenges and drive innovative solutions for our customers. We empower our team to push the boundaries of what is possible—while learning every day in a supportive leading global company. Visit our Careers website to learn more. At Applied Materials, we care about the health and wellbeing of our employees. We’re committed to providing programs and support that encourage personal and professional growth and care for you at work, at home, or wherever you may go. Learn more about our benefits. **What You’ll Do** As a Customer Support Technician, you'll work hands\-on in a cleanroom environment to build and test our multimillion\-dollar display and wafer fabrication equipment that’s behind the technology we use every day— like the VR headset you use for gaming, the smart watch that tracks your heart rate, and advancing generations of your smart phone. As key member of a team of highly skilled engineers, technicians, and problem\-solvers, you’ll receive strong collaborative support and contribute your new ideas to help us continuously improve our processes and business. **This role is based at our customer site in Leixlip, Co. Kildare and operates on a rotating day‑and‑night shift pattern. title: Data Center Security Specialist
description: **Description** Amazon Web Services (AWS) provides storage, compute and other solutions to customers, globally. Our customers trust, and expect, us to protect their data with impeccable physical security, continually evolving security practices to mitigate risk. The Data Center (DC) Security Team provides physical security solutions to protect AWS personnel, AWS facilities and information of our customers. As a Security Support Specialist you will be tasked with driving operational security excellence within Data Centers while working with partner teams and leaders. The ideal candidate will manage communications and provide services as required. You will assist with electronic surveillance and access control requests, assisting Data Centre Security Managers streamline efficiency. You will write and implement security process and procedures. Your position will require you to extract metrics and observe improvements by looking at data. The successful candidate must have a proven track record of customer service, possess excellent verbal and written communication skills, and demonstrate good judgment and critical thinking. An ideal candidate for this role will be able to work at all levels, from the theoretical knowledge of physical security principles to the practical application and real\-world implementation of processes and measures. You should have a proven record of accomplishment in operations room/centre dispatching, data centre security operations, physical security, customer service; and the ability to multi\-task. Key job responsibilities Key job responsibilities * You will manage a chat queue, phone communications, generate and/or manage trouble tickets, handle incoming chats, and provide support to customers. * Drive security awareness campaigns aimed at enhancing security vigilance and effectiveness * You will manage workflow ticketing and extraction/development of performance metrics * Configure physical security devices including cameras, readers, and panels. * Support daily operational security across a data centre campus * Distil overarching security strategy into daily tactics to reach management goals AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help. You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion. Key job responsibilities **Responsibilities** * Coordinate day\-to\-day activities and site security operations * Coordinate with operations teams across a number of business units * Provide guidance and leadership across a number of team programs * Building Partnerships through networking and innovation * Extract metrics and seeking improvements by analyzing data and trends in order to influence positive change through targeted proactive incentives. * Verify Data Center security programs are delivered to meet defined global security standards * Assist in all media integrity related programs and activities * Assist in the training of new and existing personnel regards to compliance to security policies and procedures * Handle escalations and resolve tasks delegated and/or assigned to the team * Draft reports and prepare presentations on the status of physical security operations * Collaborate with managers in writing and implementing security policies, processes and procedures based on regional or global security initiatives. * Serve as a customer advocate by identifying security\-related opportunities and crafting innovative solutions that maintain uncompromising security standards * Participate in site audits, inspections. Identifying, discussing and bringing forward issues and solutions to senior team members so to raise the security bar. **About The Team** Diverse Experiences AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying. Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Inclusive Team Culture Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship \& Career Growth We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional. Work/Life Balance We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud. **Basic Qualifications** * Experience overseeing security operations and working with security vendors/contractors * 1 to 5 years experience in operations room/centre * Exposure to Physical Security operations. **Preferred Qualifications** * 2\+ years of experience collecting, analyzing, and utilizing data * Basic knowledge of physical security systems and their operation, including access control, intrusion detection and video surveillance Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates. Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. **Company** \- Amazon Data Services Ireland Limited Job ID: A10422175

title: Data Engineer
description: **Job Title:** Data Engineer **Job type:** Contract **Job Location:** Dublin/Hybrid **Company Overview:** A global data and artificial intelligence ("AI") company that offers services and solutions to reinvent client business models, drive better outcomes, and unlock growth with speed. The company harnesses the power of data, AI, and deep industry knowledge to transform businesses, including the world's leading corporations in industries such as insurance, healthcare, banking and financial services, media, and retail, among others. Founded in 1999, the company operates with the core values of innovation, collaboration, excellence, integrity, and respect. **The Role:** Our client is seeking a **hands\-on Databricks Data Engineer** to support a high\-impact data transformation initiative focused on automating reporting and dashboard processes. You will work with structured and unstructured data sources, **building and maintaining scalable data ingestion and transformation pipelines** within a Databricks medallion architecture. This role is delivery\-focused, working closely with Data Architects and senior stakeholders to implement data solutions, develop pipelines across Bronze / Silver / Gold layers, and ensure data quality, performance, and reliability within a modern cloud\-based data platform. **Key Responsibilities:** * Data Pipeline Development: Design, build, and maintain data ingestion and transformation pipelines using Databricks, working across structured and unstructured data sources. * Medallion Architecture Implementation: Develop and support data pipelines across bronze, silver and gold layers, ensuring data is cleansed, transformed, and optimised for downstream reporting and analytics. * Data Integration \& Processing: Implement batch and streaming data pipelines using tools such as Databricks, Spark, and Azure Data Factory (ADF) to enable efficient data movement and processing. * Collaboration with Architects \& Stakeholders: Work closely with Data Architects and business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into reliable, maintainable data engineering solutions. * Data Quality \& Validation: Support the implementation of data quality checks, validation rules, and monitoring processes to ensure accuracy and reliability of data pipelines. * Performance Optimisation: Assist in optimising data pipeline performance, scalability, and cost efficiency within Databricks and cloud environments. * Data Governance \& Standards: Follow established best practices for data governance, lineage, and metadata management, ensuring compliance with organisational standards. * Testing, Deployment \& Release Support: Support testing, deployment, and release processes, ensuring solutions are robust and production ready. * Documentation: Create and maintain technical documentation, including pipeline logic, data flows, and transformation rules. * Continuous Improvement: Stay up to date with Databricks features and modern data engineering practices, contributing to ongoing improvements in tooling, frameworks, and ways of working. **Experience Required:** * Education \& Experience: Bachelor's degree in IT, Computer Science, or a related field, with 3\-6 years' experience in data engineering, data warehousing, or related roles. * Databricks \& Data Engineering Skills: Hands\-on experience with Databricks and Spark\-based data processing, including building and maintaining data pipelines. * Data Integration \& Processing: Experience working with ETL/ELT pipelines using tools such as Databricks, Azure Data Factory (ADF), or similar frameworks. * Data Platform \& Database Knowledge: Experience working with enterprise data stores such as SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Oracle, Synapse, or similar. * Cloud Experience: Exposure to cloud\-based data platforms (Azure preferred) and distributed data processing environments. * Business Intelligence Awareness: Basic understanding of reporting tools such as Power BI or Tableau, and how data pipelines support analytics and dashboards. * Industry Experience (Desirable): Experience within Financial Services or regulated environments is beneficial. If you are interested in this role or would like to discuss it further, please call Nidhi at \+353 1 645 5244 or email nidhi.tripathi@experis.ie.

This residency is not a traditional internship — it is a high\-value, value\-for\-value exchange. We work with CEOs, senior leaders and organisations including Amazon, Deloitte, Google and EY across Ireland, the UK and Europe. We are looking for one dedicated individual — whether a hungry graduate, someone with a few years experience, or someone returning to the workforce — who wants to help us grow our digital presence while undergoing a personal transformation that will set them up for life. **A €10,000 Investment in You** This role is unpaid. In return you will receive a 6 month bespoke Executive Voice and Leadership Coaching programme worth €10,000 plus. We will coach you to master your vocal power, command any room and communicate with the calm authority that usually takes decades to build. You will leave this residency sounding — and feeling — completely different. **What You Will Actually Do** This is a digital marketing and brand role. Here is exactly what you will own: **Social Media Management — Day One Priority** * Managing and growing our LinkedIn and Instagram presence daily * Creating and scheduling content using Buffer * Building our Facebook presence and running Facebook ad campaigns * Keeping our social channels active, consistent and premium **Email Marketing** * Setting up and managing our email marketing and mailouts * Building and maintaining our audience list * Writing and scheduling regular email campaigns **SEO \& Google** * Basic SEO work across the Simply Voice website * Managing and optimising our Google My Business profile * Keyword research and implementing improvements **PR \& Media — Desirable But Not Essential** * Pitching Simply Voice to national radio — Newstalk, RTÉ * Targeting business podcasts and press opportunities * Writing press releases and media pitches **Who You Are** You have a background or strong interest in digital marketing, social media, communications or PR. Specifically you are comfortable with: * Instagram, LinkedIn and Facebook — not just using them but growing them * Facebook Ads Manager — you know how to set up and run a campaign * Canva and CapCut for content creation * Email marketing tools — Mailchimp, Flodesk or similar * Basic SEO principles and Google My Business * Buffer or similar scheduling tools **You are also:** * Self directed — you do not need constant hand holding * Organised — you deliver what you say you will deliver * Proactive — you spot opportunities and act on them * Trend aware — you know what is working on social media right now and you love it * Professional — you understand that Simply Voice works at the highest corporate level and everything you produce must reflect that **This is NOT the right role if you:** * Need constant supervision and direction * Are primarily interested in design or creative work * Cannot commit consistently each week * Are looking for a passive portfolio piece **A €10,000 Investment in You** For the right person this is genuinely life changing. Six months of executive voice and presence coaching — the same coaching we deliver to CEOs at Amazon, Deloitte and Google — is yours. You will leave with a voice, a presence and a confidence that will open doors for the rest of your career. **How to Apply** Generic CVs will not be considered. We want to hear your voice before we see your history. We have been flooded with AI generated cover letters. The irony is not lost on us — we are an executive voice coaching company. If you are using ChatGPT to tell us why you want to work with us, you have already missed the point. We are looking for the 1% who still know how to be human. Do not just click a button. Do not send a generic template. Pick up the phone. Send a voice note. Write a letter that is so authentically you that a computer could not have dreamt it up. Tell us: * Why you want to spend 6 months mastering your voice * How you would grow Simply Voice's digital presence from day one * What you would do in the first week to get the June event sold out Email **info@simplyvoice.ie, contact number \+353 876974332** with the subject **"The 2026 Simply Voice Residency"** **For more information \-** https://www.simplyvoice.ie/voiceresidency Closing date: **Friday 20th May 2026 at 5pm**

title: Digital Marketing Executive
description: **Digital Marketing Executive** Join a dynamic marketing team in Beacon Hospital, Sandyford, South Dublin. It's one of Europe's most innovative and technologically advanced private hospitals with over 2,000 staff working together as a team to deliver exceptional patient care. Help us to creatively communicate to patients, GPs, staff and the general public about all the new and innovative healthcare services we have to offer. The Digital Marketing Executive will report to the Marketing Director and will work closely with the Marketing Manager to develop and plan the digital marketing strategy for the hospital to drive online growth and brand awareness. The main objective of their role will be to plan, execute and manage all digital marketing including website content, SEO, SEM, email marketing and social media. The ideal candidate will have a speciality in social media, photography, videography, design, digital data analytics, have strong writing skills and be highly organised. They will also have the opportunity to work on other marketing activities to support the team and will gain experience in all aspects of marketing. **Job Description** * **Strategy Development:** Design and implement comprehensive digital marketing strategies to increase brand awareness, promote services and drive website engagement and traffic. * **Campaign Management:** Plan and execute SEO/SEM, email marketing, social media, and display advertising campaigns. * **Analytics and Reporting:** Monitor, analyse, and report on campaign performance (ROI and KPIs) to optimise results. * ***Content and Social Media*** \- Managing all our social media platforms, generating new content that is relevant, engaging and informative. Driving increased engagement and followers on all our social platforms. * ***Website*** \- ownership of the hospital's main website ensuring that all content is accurate, displayed correctly and up to date. Writing new content and refreshing existing content as well increasing * ***Photography and Videography*** \- taking photos and videos for use in hospital related content across all hospital platforms. * ***Staff Digital Comms*** \- writing content and producing our staff comms update emails. * ***Providing Support \& Assistance*** \- providing support and assistance to the team in relation to Events, Sponsorships, Design \& Print, Advertising Campaigns (Medical and Consumer) and in any other projects which the Department is tasked with. Assisting with the training and support of new junior members of the team. * ***Budget*** \- working closely with the rest of the marketing team to manage the marketing budget to ensure that all marketing activity and purchase orders are within budget. * ***Digital Initiatives*** \- Development and ownership of a new Beacon Hospital health related digital projects. * ***Creativity*** \- bringing new and creative ideas to a team that is always open to trying new and exciting marketing methods. **Skill Set** * Qualification in Digital Marketing * Experienced in social media and digital marketing * Strength at website management and development * Confident in data analytics * Skilled at photography, videography and graphic design * Ability to take ownership of projects and take them to completion * Ability to work off own initiative * Time management and prioritisation should not be a problem * Creative and a real passion for marketing * Strong writing skills and attention to detail * Confident, self\-starter with the ability to engage with people on all levels * Excellent organisational skills and advanced in excel, word and PowerPoint * Experience in using the below tools: **Common Tools used** Canva Constant Contact Meta \& Linkedin Platforms Email Marketing Platforms Adobe Suite WordPress Hootsuite \& Buffer Google Analytics/GA4 This marketing role will give you an incredible opportunity to grow and advance your skillset. You will own all Digital Marketing projects and be involved in supporting other areas of marketing. **Beacon Hospital is expanding, so come join our growing team!**

title: Document Analyst | Upto $160/hr
description: **About The Job** **Mercor** connects elite creative and technical talent with leading AI research labs. Headquartered in San Francisco, our investors include **Benchmark** , **General Catalyst** , **Peter Thiel** , **Adam D'Angelo** , **Larry Summers** , and **Jack Dorsey** . **Position:** Generalist **Type:** **Contract** **Compensation:** **$80–$160/hour** **Location:** **Remote** **Role Responsibilities** * Review and assess domain\-specific documents for quality, accuracy, and relevance. * Provide structured feedback to enhance document evaluation projects. * Utilize strong analytical skills to contribute to high\-impact evaluations. * Collaborate asynchronously with teams to ensure document standards are met. * Work independently to meet deadlines and improve project outcomes. **Qualifications** **Must\-Have** * Bachelor's degree (minimum) * 2\+ years of professional experience in a relevant domain * Strong proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint, and Word * Strong document analysis and review skills * Attention to detail and ability to follow structured guidelines **Preferred** * Based in the United States, Europe, UK, or Canada **Application Process (Takes 20–30 mins to complete)** * Upload resume * AI interview based on your resume * Submit form **Resources \& Support** * For details about the interview process and platform information, please check: https://talent.docs.mercor.com/welcome * For any help or support, reach out to: support@mercor.com *PS: Our team reviews applications daily. title: E-Commerce Associate EMEA
description: **We are looking for an E\-Commerce Associate to join our Marketing team in the UK or Ireland.** **This position offers flexibility for remote work in both countries.** The E\-Commerce Associate EMEA will play a pivotal role in supporting the e\-commerce leader as we look to drive significant growth in this channel. This role will act as a support to the eCommerce operations with ResMed’s global and regional objectives, ensuring we can execute with excellence and expand our presence online. The E\-Commerce Associate EMEA will work closely with cross\-functional teams (eCommerce, Revenue, Marketing, GTS, Supply Chain) to achieve seamless execution and ensure we can delight our patients with a frictionless buying experience. **Let’s Talk About The Role** The E\-Commerce Associate will be responsible for executing our plans across the 3 sub\-regions in EMEA with a strong focus on UK, DE and FR. This role will be critical to optimise the eCommerce business today and expand to new markets and channels. This role will develop content for our promotional plans, newsletters for our eShop users and help support new products online. It will also be critical to provide the data and insights to shape the plans and optimize. **Let’s Talk About Responsibilities** * Operational Excellence * Support on the promotional calendar and delivery of 3 main campaigns a year to drive revenue and attract new users to the DTC space. * Help with the transition from legacy platforms to a more scalable e\-commerce system, ensuring the platform experience is enhanced for our users. * Manage day\-to\-day operations, guaranteeing high platform performance, a superior consumer experience, and adherence to regional compliance standards. * Customer Experience \& Engagement * Ensure an outstanding digital consumer experience, optimising the entire consumer journey from discovery to post\-purchase retention. * Leverage data and customer feedback to continuously improve UX/UI, consumer satisfaction, and retention metrics. * Sales and Marketing Alignment * Collaborate with eCommerce regional and global team to execute digital marketing campaigns, optimizing for both brand visibility and revenue growth in key focus markets. * Support on merchandising, promotional campaigns, and other revenue\-driving activities to ensure alignment in attaining sales goals and consumer behaviour in EMEA markets. * Data\-Driven Decision Making * Analyze e\-commerce metrics to assess performance, and provide actionable insights to the team. * Compliance and Regulatory Oversight * Ensure the e\-commerce business remains compliant with regional and industry regulations, owning the MLR approval process. **Let’s Talk About Qualifications And Experience** Required **:** * Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or related field (Master’s preferred). * Minimum of 2 years in a marketing / eCommerce role * Fluent in English, with additional EMEA languages being a plus. **Let’s Talk About Soft Skills** * Strong collaboration skills: Able to work cross functionally with different leadership styles / cultures to forge strong relationships that can deliver results. * Highly motivated: Willing to really make a difference. Able to manage complexity and drive forward even with uncertainty. * Commercial Accumen: Experience in managing budgets, forecasting, and data reporting. Ability to use the data to inform the business decision. **Ok, so what's next?** Joining us is more than saying “yes” to making the world a healthier place. It’s discovering a career that’s challenging, supportive and inspiring. Where a culture driven by excellence helps you not only meet your goals, but also create new ones. We focus on creating a diverse and inclusive culture, encouraging individual expression in the workplace and thrive on the innovative ideas this generates. If this sounds like the workplace for you, apply now! Joining us is more than saying “yes” to making the world a healthier place. It’s discovering a career that’s challenging, supportive and inspiring. Where a culture driven by excellence helps you not only meet your goals, but also create new ones. We focus on creating a diverse and inclusive culture, encouraging individual expression in the workplace and thrive on the innovative ideas this generates. If this sounds like the workplace for you, apply now!

title: EV Operations Engineer
description: **The Role:** Join a fast\-growing tech company delivering EV charging solutions across Ireland. This role blends hardware, software, and customer support, giving you hands\-on exposure to connected devices and real\-world infrastructure. **Responsibilities:** * Provide **1st and 2nd line operations support** across EV charging hardware and software platforms * Troubleshoot issues related to **hardware, connectivity, networking, and user access** * Manage incoming support tickets via ticketing systems * Monitor live systems and proactively respond to alerts or faults * Support **remote diagnostics** , onboarding, and customer issue resolution * Coordinate with internal engineering teams and third\-party partners to escalate complex issues * Manage and support EV chargers installed at customer homes and commercial sites * Occasionally travel to customer sites to diagnose and resolve technical issues * Maintain accurate documentation and contribute to the internal knowledge base * Take full ownership and accountability for customer issues from start to resolution **Required:** * **Experience** in technical support, IT support, or field support roles * Degree in **Electrical Engineering, IT or a related field** * Strong troubleshooting skills across **hardware and software environments** * Experience using ticketing systems. * Excellent communication skills with a strong **customer\-first mindset** * Professional, outgoing personality with strong interpersonal skills * Knowledge in EV, IoT, telecoms, or energy sector is a plus *** Full, clean driver’s licence**

title: Electrical Colocation Regional Engineer, Colo Regional Engineering
description: **DESCRIPTION** --------------- AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help. You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion. As a Colo Regional Engineer, you will drive Mechanical/Electrical Engineering services, construction and implementation of enterprise data centers, which meet quality and performance levels across the globe. You will work directly with our Design Engineering Stakeholders, Construction, Operations, and Commissioning teams regionally and globally. You will be leading projects to fit out the data centers we support to meet ever\-evolving customer needs as we continue expanding our fleet to hyper\-scale. The Colo Regional Engineer is the engineering representative on behalf of the Data Center Field Engineering Team responsible for the successful delivery of projects. In this role, you will assist in Data Center site selection, planning, development. You will evaluate different mechanical/electrical systems and make a data driven decision about a suitable solution based on our guidelines. Key job responsibilities * Work with colo vendors to review the design for new Data Centers in your region, including design input, submittal review and incorporating AWS products to ensure the design is meeting AWS expectations. * Act as resident engineer during new colo construction projects. Support construction, commissioning, and handover. * Troubleshoot, conduct Root Cause Analysis (RCA) and create Corrective Action (CA) documentation for site/equipment failures. * Directly support operational issues with ad\-hoc training, complex operating procedure reviews, including essential equipment, and event support. * Provide technical support to the design for existing data center upgrades and design\-solutions, which add capacity, improve availability, and increase efficiency. * Supporting operating partners to lead, review, and approve designs for existing co\-location (colo) data center upgrades which improve availability/efficiency. * Interface with operating partners, data center design engineering team, server hardware team, environmental health and safety team to promote standards that maintain consistency and reliability in services delivered by operating partners. * Work on concurrent projects, sometimes in multiple geographical regions. * Initiate and lead engineering site audits within leased or colo data centers. Produce reports outlining risks with recommended mitigations and remediation's. A day in the life Each day you will interact with different teams responsible for all aspects of the data centers. You will prioritize your activities to support data center capacity availability and safety focusing on the actions that are most impactful. You will have the opportunity to work on projects locally and globally. You will be leading projects to fit out the data centers we support to meet ever\-evolving customer needs as we continue expanding our fleet to hyper\-scale About the team We are a collaborative group of engineering professionals dedicated to pushing the boundaries of data center design and implementation. Our team is committed to creating robust, efficient, and scalable infrastructure that supports global technological innovation. We value technical excellence, creative problem\-solving, and a passion for continuous improvement. Why AWS Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Work/Life Balance We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve. Inclusive Team Culture Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship and Career Growth We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS** ------------------------ * Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering or a related field * Knowledge of Microsoft Office including Outlook, Word, and Excel * Experience in industrial or commercial engineering in mission critical facilities including but not limited to: data centers, power generation or oil and gas facilities * Experience researching new designs, technologies, and construction methods of data center equipment and facilities * Experience in commissioning **PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS** ---------------------------- * Professional Engineer License * Experience with building codes and regulations for your region * Experience carrying design concepts through exploration, development, and into deployment or mass production * Experience reading, interpreting, and creating construction drawings, specifications, and submittal documents Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates. Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
